---
title: 'Discovery | Interests and Passions'
date: '2014-10-20T06:34:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2041264302506927471'
blogger_filename: '/2014/10/discovery-interests-and-passions.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discovery'
---

<h4>Interests and Passions</h4>What are some of the things you enjoy doing/being? Just spit out the words as they come to mind. <br /><br />Writing,  Blogging, Internet (HTML/CSS), Reading Non Fiction, Reading Fiction,  Study, Learning, Reading anything I get my hands on. Gardening. Soda.  Cheeseburgers. Cooking. Discovery Channel. Science Fiction. Prophecy (End Times). Addiction/Recovery Topics. Finances. Personal Growth. Calling and Purpose. <br /><br />
